steps.title: Treat the names as essential
steps.content: The names hexafluorobenzene and benzene identify which liquid compounds have the stated molar masses. Because those names are essential to the meaning, they should not be set off with commas.

steps.title: Remove nonessential commas
steps.content: Choice A incorrectly uses commas on both sides. Choice B leaves a stray comma after the names. Choice C incorrectly opens a comma break before the names. The no-comma version treats the compound names as essential identifiers. The answer is D.
